'''thowakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillovesicular|fibrillovesicular]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-w-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillovesicular|fibrillovesicular]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thowakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowakithi|thowakithi]] || [[word:thowakiji|thowakiji]] || [[word:thowakishi|thowakishi]] || [[word:thowakiki|thowakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowakuthuthu|thowakuthuthu]] || [[word:thowakujuju|thowakujuju]] || [[word:thowakushushu|thowakushushu]] || [[word:thowakukuku|thowakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowakuthu|thowakuthu]] || [[word:thowakuju|thowakuju]] || [[word:thowakushu|thowakushu]] || [[word:thowakuku|thowakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowakufthuf|thowakufthuf]] || [[word:thowakufjuf|thowakufjuf]] || [[word:thowakufshuf|thowakufshuf]] || [[word:thowakufkuf|thowakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowakethe|thowakethe]] || [[word:thowakeje|thowakeje]] || [[word:thowakeshe|thowakeshe]] || [[word:thowakeke|thowakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowakothotho|thowakothotho]] || [[word:thowakojojo|thowakojojo]] || [[word:thowakoshosho|thowakoshosho]] || [[word:thowakokoko|thowakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowakotho|thowakotho]] || [[word:thowakojo|thowakojo]] || [[word:thowakosho|thowakosho]] || [[word:thowakoko|thowakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowakofthof|thowakofthof]] || [[word:thowakofjof|thowakofjof]] || [[word:thowakofshof|thowakofshof]] || [[word:thowakofkof|thowakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowakïfthïf|thowakïfthïf]] || [[word:thowakïfjïf|thowakïfjïf]] || [[word:thowakïfshïf|thowakïfshïf]] || [[word:thowakïfkïf|thowakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowakïfthïfthïf|thowakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:thowakïfjïfjïf|thowakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:thowakïfshïfshïf|thowakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:thowakïfkïfkïf|thowakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowakïfthïf|thowakïfthïf]] || [[word:thowakïfjïf|thowakïfjïf]] || [[word:thowakïfshïf|thowakïfshïf]] || [[word:thowakïfkïf|thowakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowakïfthïf|thowakïfthïf]] || [[word:thowakïfjïf|thowakïfjïf]] || [[word:thowakïfshïf|thowakïfshïf]] || [[word:thowakïfkïf|thowakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thowakæthæ|thowakæthæ]] || [[word:thowakæjæ|thowakæjæ]] || [[word:thowakæshæ|thowakæshæ]] || [[word:thowakækæ|thowakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thowakathatha|thowakathatha]] || [[word:thowakajaja|thowakajaja]] || [[word:thowakashasha|thowakashasha]] || [[word:thowakakaka|thowakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowakatha|thowakatha]] || [[word:thowakaja|thowakaja]] || [[word:thowakasha|thowakasha]] || [[word:thowakaka|thowakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowakafthaf|thowakafthaf]] || [[word:thowakafjaf|thowakafjaf]] || [[word:thowakafshaf|thowakafshaf]] || [[word:thowakafkaf|thowakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thowakasha|thowakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowakshësha|thowakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowakrosha|thowakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowakmusha|thowakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowakyasha|thowakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowaknkshësha|gothowaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowaknkrosha|gothowaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowaknkmusha|gothowaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowaknkyasha|gothowaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thowawakasha|thowawakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowawakshësha|thowawakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowawakrosha|thowawakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowawakmusha|thowawakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowawakyasha|thowawakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowawaknkshësha|gothowawaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowawaknkrosha|gothowawaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowawaknkmusha|gothowawaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowawaknkyasha|gothowawaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thewækasha|thewækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thewækshësha|thewækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thewækrosha|thewækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thewækmusha|thewækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thewækyasha|thewækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothewæknkshësha|gothewæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothewæknkrosha|gothewæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothewæknkmusha|gothewæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothewæknkyasha|gothewæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thowfakasha|thowfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thowfakshësha|thowfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thowfakrosha|thowfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thowfakmusha|thowfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thowfakyasha|thowfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothowfaknkshësha|gothowfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothowfaknkrosha|gothowfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothowfaknkmusha|gothowfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothowfaknkyasha|gothowfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
